'''pobashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:upbound|upbound]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:upbound|upbound]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pobashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pobashithi|pobashithi]] || [[word:pobashiji|pobashiji]] || [[word:pobashishi|pobashishi]] || [[word:pobashiki|pobashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pobashuthuthu|pobashuthuthu]] || [[word:pobashujuju|pobashujuju]] || [[word:pobashushushu|pobashushushu]] || [[word:pobashukuku|pobashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pobashuthu|pobashuthu]] || [[word:pobashuju|pobashuju]] || [[word:pobashushu|pobashushu]] || [[word:pobashuku|pobashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pobashufthuf|pobashufthuf]] || [[word:pobashufjuf|pobashufjuf]] || [[word:pobashufshuf|pobashufshuf]] || [[word:pobashufkuf|pobashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pobashethe|pobashethe]] || [[word:pobasheje|pobasheje]] || [[word:pobasheshe|pobasheshe]] || [[word:pobasheke|pobasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pobashothotho|pobashothotho]] || [[word:pobashojojo|pobashojojo]] || [[word:pobashoshosho|pobashoshosho]] || [[word:pobashokoko|pobashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pobashotho|pobashotho]] || [[word:pobashojo|pobashojo]] || [[word:pobashosho|pobashosho]] || [[word:pobashoko|pobashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pobashofthof|pobashofthof]] || [[word:pobashofjof|pobashofjof]] || [[word:pobashofshof|pobashofshof]] || [[word:pobashofkof|pobashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfthĂŻf|pobashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfjĂŻf|pobashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfshĂŻf|pobashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfkĂŻf|pobashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|pobashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|pobashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|pobashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|pobashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfthĂŻf|pobashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfjĂŻf|pobashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfshĂŻf|pobashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfkĂŻf|pobashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfthĂŻf|pobashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfjĂŻf|pobashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfshĂŻf|pobashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pobashĂŻfkĂŻf|pobashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pobashĂŠthĂŠ|pobashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:pobashĂŠjĂŠ|pobashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:pobashĂŠshĂŠ|pobashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:pobashĂŠkĂŠ|pobashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pobashathatha|pobashathatha]] || [[word:pobashajaja|pobashajaja]] || [[word:pobashashasha|pobashashasha]] || [[word:pobashakaka|pobashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pobashatha|pobashatha]] || [[word:pobashaja|pobashaja]] || [[word:pobashasha|pobashasha]] || [[word:pobashaka|pobashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pobashafthaf|pobashafthaf]] || [[word:pobashafjaf|pobashafjaf]] || [[word:pobashafshaf|pobashafshaf]] || [[word:pobashafkaf|pobashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:pobashasha|pobashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:pobashĂ«sha|pobashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pobashrosha|pobashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pobashmusha|pobashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:pobashyasha|pobashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopobashnkshĂ«sha|gopobashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopobashnkrosha|gopobashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopobashnkmusha|gopobashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopobashnkyasha|gopobashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:pobabashasha|pobabashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pobabashĂ«sha|pobabashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pobabashrosha|pobabashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pobabashmusha|pobabashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pobabashyasha|pobabashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopobabashnkshĂ«sha|gopobabashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopobabashnkrosha|gopobabashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopobabashnkmusha|gopobabashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopobabashnkyasha|gopobabashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pebĂŠshasha|pebĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pebĂŠshĂ«sha|pebĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pebĂŠshrosha|pebĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pebĂŠshmusha|pebĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pebĂŠshyasha|pebĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopebĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gopebĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopebĂŠshnkrosha|gopebĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopebĂŠshnkmusha|gopebĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopebĂŠshnkyasha|gopebĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:pobfashasha|pobfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pobfashĂ«sha|pobfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pobfashrosha|pobfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pobfashmusha|pobfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pobfashyasha|pobfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopobfashnkshĂ«sha|gopobfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopobfashnkrosha|gopobfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopobfashnkmusha|gopobfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopobfashnkyasha|gopobfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
